ValueListReference.name: Number of Media container overrides List

Calculation.Text: "Enter a description for this list template"
"Type a label name for this textfield"
"Type a label name for this textfield"
"Type a label name for this mediafield"
"Type a label name for this textfield"
"Type a label name for this textfield"
"Type a label name for this mediafield"
PatternCount(Self; "Sketched Coded Styled") Or PatternCount ( Self ; "Requires maintenance" )
"Type a label name for this textfield"
List template::Value 1 type ≠ "IO" And List template::Value 1 type ≠ "IO array" // Both IO and IO array makes it visible
List template::Value 1 type ≠ "IO" And List template::Value 1 type ≠ "IO array" // Both IO and IO array makes it visible
"Type a label name for this textfield"
"Type a label name for this textfield"
SetProperty ( "modifier_template_type" ; ModifierTemplate @ List template::Type ) & SetProperty ( "modifier_template_id" ; ModifierTemplate @ List template::PrimaryKey )
Not PatternCount ( ModifierTemplate @ List template::Type ; "Value list")

StyledText.Data: You can choose any name for your attribute. However, the name will be “prettified” using _underscore_in the JSON key.

Choose attribute type depending on how you want to the JSON key value to be formatted. Prettified string Will replace capital letters with lower-case, åäö with aao and spaces with dash “-”. Number An integer value. If empty it will be replaced with 0 (zero). URL encoded string A string where all characters except A-Z, a-z are replaced with %. Media reference Will enable a media container as an attribute input. The value will be the prettified file name of the media file in the container. The media itself will be included in the media export. String Unaltered key value. Depending on characters, this might create a corrupt JSON. CSS Key values with type CSS will be exported to file “src/assets/css/cmt.scss”. The CSS key value can only be used for the Learning programme level.

CharacterStyle.Text: Key values with type CSS will be exported to file “src/assets/css/cmt.scss”. The CSS key value can only be used for the Learning programme level.

StyledText.Data: The attribute description will be visible for authors and editors when adding content and entering key values to the FAT.

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gModifierName ) Or IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gModifierType )

StyledText.Data: This is the default value when creating a new IO based on this IO type. The default value must be a valid value.
